yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_CVE20264838__SourceCodester_Malawi_Onlin {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-4838 - SourceCodester Malawi Online Market display.php sql injection"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-26"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-4838" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "SourceCodester" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Shadow_Agents_How_SentinelOne_Secures_th {

        date = "2026-03-26"

                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "SentinelOne" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 113 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 60 as HIGH risk. 26 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, UNC-UNKNOWN, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
